site_description: Your AI-powered guide to Indian government schemes

hero.title: Find Government Schemes You're Eligible For
hero.subtitle: Search from 2,300+ central and state government schemes. Use our AI chatbot to find the right schemes for you.

browse.category_subtitle: Find government schemes organized by sector
browse.state_subtitle: Find government schemes available in your state or union territory
browse.ministry_subtitle: Find government schemes by implementing ministry

chat.welcome_sub: Ask me about government schemes, eligibility, or how to apply.

schemes_page.no_results: No schemes found. Try adjusting your filters.

eligibility.title: Find Schemes For You

cta.title: Not sure which scheme is right for you?
cta.subtitle: Our AI chatbot can help you find the right government schemes based on your profile. Just tell us about yourself and we'll match you with eligible schemes.

footer.description: Your AI-powered guide to Indian government schemes. Find schemes you are eligible for.
footer.about_text: This is an open-source project built for educational purposes. Data sourced from publicly available datasets.
footer.built_with: SevanaGPT — Built with Next.js, FastAPI, and Mistral AI
